overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from a video game (Red Dead Redemption 2) showing a player walking through a prairie landscape at golden hour. The player approaches a wagon surrounded by dead cattle and vultures in a desolate burned area, then continues exploring the open terrain toward distant rock formations.

agents.ego_description: walking through tall grass toward a stand of dead trees on a hillside

entered.detail: cluster of tall dead tree trunks standing on the hillside
wooden wagon with canvas cover visible in the distance
tall grass and shrubs in the foreground
mountain range visible on the horizon

segments.scene_description: The player walks through sparse prairie vegetation toward a hillside dotted with dead trees. A wagon becomes visible in the distance as the camera approaches the desolate area.

events.description: dead cattle carcasses come into close view near the wagon

agents.ego_description: circling around the wagon and examining the dead cattle on the ground

notable_agents.action: vultures circling overhead above the carcasses

entered.detail: multiple dead cows with visible wounds lying on the ground
thin column of smoke rising from the wagon area

segments.scene_description: The player approaches the wagon and discovers dead cattle carcasses on the ground. The camera circles the scene, showing the wooden wagon with smoke rising from it and vultures circling overhead.

scene_state.functional_zone: open prairie with distant rock formations

events.description: moving away from the wagon site into open prairie landscape

agents.ego_description: turning away from the wagon and walking toward open terrain

entered.detail: large red rock outcropping visible on the horizon
single large living tree in the open prairie

segments.scene_description: The player leaves the wagon and dead cattle behind, moving into open prairie. A large living tree and distant red rock formations come into view as the landscape opens up.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the prairie toward distant rock formations

segments.scene_description: The player continues walking through the open prairie as the sun creates a warm backlit atmosphere. The red rock formations shift to the left as the camera moves forward through scattered vegetation.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a desolate, scorched hillside into a vast, sun-drenched prairie landscape. It begins by traversing sparse vegetation toward a hillside of dead trees, where a lone wagon gradually emerges from the distance. As the camera reaches the wagon, the scene reveals a grim tableau of dead cattle carcasses and rising smoke while vultures circle in the air above. The perspective then shifts away from the wreckage, moving back into the open prairie as a large living tree and distant red rock formations come into view. Finally, the camera advances through scattered greenery under a warm, backlit golden hour glow, with the red rocks shifting to the left as the horizon opens up.
